Petition To Terminate Trust And Distribute Assets, Or In The Alternative Appoint Special Trustee And To Dismiss Petition For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Aug-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Sheldon Lim. Anthony Basile for Alan Lim.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that they made more progress, that they had agreed as to appointment of a Special Trustee, that there was an issue with regard to the scope of the Special Trustee's responsibility, that they put the property on the market and did not need a Special Trustee, and they got an offer which is expected to close by the middle of next month. The Petition to Terminate Trust and Distribute Assets, etc. was continued to August 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on sale of the property.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Terminate Trust And Distribute Assets, Or In The Alternative Appoint Special Trustee And To Dismiss Petition For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Sheldon Lim. Anthony Basile for Alan Lim.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that they have been discussing and exchanging e-mail, that he is willing to withdraw his petition of abandonment and appoint a Special Trustee, that they have exchanged names and that they have not agreed on an individual. The Petition to Terminate Trust and Distribute Assets, etc. was continued to June 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on selection of a Special Trustee.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Sheldon Lim. Anthony Basile for Alan Lim (Trustee).

Mr. McCaffrey stated that they had two settlement conference sessions with Judge Miller, that Mr. Casas is preparing a document that will map out a road to settlement which will hopefully resolve the matter and requested a 60-day continuance. The Petition for Breach of Trust was continued to July 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Sheldon Lim (Trustee). Daniel Casas for and with Alan Lim.

The Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings was presented and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court granted the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings as to the 4th claim with 10 days leave to amend, and denied the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings as to the remaining claims. Mr. Casas is to prepare the order.

Discussions regarding mediation or the setting of a settlement conference were held. Alan Lim addressed the Court as set forth on the record. The Court stated that it was referring the parties to Judge Marla Miller for a mandatory settlement conference, that Judge Miller's Clerk would be in touch with Counsel to arrange a date, that it was keeping the current status date of 4/20/11 on calendar, and that the parties should contact the Probate Examiner by 4/15/11 if the settlement conference with Judge Miller is still pending and the 4/20/11 date needs to be continued.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Continued To Apr-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Basile for and with Alan Lim (Beneficiary). Brian McCaffrey for Sheldon Lim (Trustee).

Mr. McCaffrey stated that almost nothing has been done since the last hearing, that written discovery has been sent to him and in the mail, and that he drafted a motion for judgment on the pleadings which is to be filed within the next few days. The matter was continued to April 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of trial setting. Counsel will discuss mediation with their Clients.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for and with Sheldon Lim. Dan Casas for and with Allen Lim.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the life estate of Ms. Lee being/not being an amendment to the Trust, the Trustee's fees being paid in the form of a lien against the property, taxes and maintenance of the property and the loan taken out on the property. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Continued To Mar-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Casas for and with Allen Lim (Respondent). Brian McCaffrey for and with Sheldon Lim (Trustee).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation with regard to the the scope of the life estate, expenses other than rent, the repayment terms of the loan and the Trustee's fees. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 26, 2010. A status conference is set for March 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to notify the Examiner by March 3, 2010 as to the outcome of mediation. The matter was also continued to March 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
